scripts.audit:core: test -f aider-vision-core/scripts/audit_rename_compat.py && python aider-vision-core/scripts/audit_rename_compat.py || echo 'skip audit:core (legacy submodule absent)'
scripts.test:local: yarn tsc --noEmit && yarn test && yarn test:rust
scripts.test:e2e:llm: E2E_OLLAMA_MODEL=ollama_chat/llama3.2:3b E2E_LLM=1 E2E_PYTHON=.venv/bin/python3 playwright test -c playwright.llm.config.ts
scripts.test:llm:core: E2E_OLLAMA_MODEL=ollama_chat/llama3.2:3b E2E_LLM=1 python3 -m pytest tests/core/test_hello_llm.py tests/core/test_agent_llm.py -q
scripts.test:full: yarn tsc --noEmit && yarn test && yarn test:rust && yarn test:e2e
scripts.test:bright-core: python -m pytest tests/core/test_git_workspace.py tests/core/test_workspace_todos.py tests/core/test_http_api.py tests/core/test_http_interrupt.py tests/core/test_http_session_todos.py tests/core/test_http_session_persistence.py tests/core/test_superproject_integration.py tests/core/test_headless_args.py tests/core/test_headless_persistence.py tests/core/test_headless_agent.py tests/core/test_session_crypto.py tests/core/test_sessions.py tests/core/test_llm_ollama.py -q
